subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! [3.5s]... ...The obligatory prayers are binding inasmuch as they are conducive to humility and submissiveness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت صلوه فرض و واجب است زیرا سبب خضوع و خشوع و توجه و تبتل الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
